claims.claim: Public explore gallery accessible without login at raccoonai.tech/explore
Free forever plan confirmed — no credit card required
Natural language to web app — generation speed and quality
claims.evidence: Raccoon AI generates production-ready Next.js applications with modern React patterns and can integrate with any external API.

claims.claim: Presentation generation — slides created from topic prompt
claims.evidence: "Create Presentations Create Presentations Design professional slide decks, pitch decks, and visual reports."

claims.claim: Data analysis — CSV or tabular input handled correctly
claims.evidence: "Drop in spreadsheets, images, or documents, turn on connectors like Gmail or Google Calendar and tell Raccoon what you need to get done."

claims.claim: Google Drive/Gmail integration — auth and data retrieval work
claims.evidence: "Drop in spreadsheets, images, or documents, turn on connectors like Gmail or Google Calendar and tell Raccoon what you need to get done."

claims.claim: 1 concurrent task limit enforced on free plan
Export options — apps/slides downloadable or shareable via public link
claims.evidence: You can download the generated document directly from the workspace, export them on Google Drive, Sheets, Slides, etc. or even publish them on Raccoon AI for instant access on a shareable link.
